summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of FORGE v7 P1 features: Multi-model picker, User settings, Integration connect/disconnect, Deploy endpoints. All 29 new tests passed + 20 v6 regression tests passed (49 total).
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/models correctly returns 7 models with provider field (anthropic/openai/gemini), claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929 marked as recommended
GET /api/settings returns proper defaults: model_id=claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929, system_prompt='', byo_keys={}, all integrations disconnected
PUT /api/settings correctly validates model_id (400 for unknown), system_prompt length (400 for >8000 chars), and stores/clears byo_keys
Integration connect endpoints (GitHub/Vercel/Netlify) correctly validate tokens against real APIs and return 401 for fake tokens
DELETE /api/integrations/{provider} returns {disconnected: true} even when not connected, 400 for unknown provider
Deploy endpoints (github/push, vercel/deploy, netlify/deploy) correctly return 400 with 'not connected' message when integration not set up
Chat endpoints correctly use _get_user_settings + _resolve_chat_model + _effective_system_prompt - no regression after settings refactor
All existing features (export ZIP, activity log, invite, Stripe checkout) continue to work correctly

success_rate.backend: 100% (29/29 v7 tests + 20/20 v6 regression tests = 49/49 total)

test_credentials.note: Test users cleaned up after testing via pytest fixture

seed_data_creation: Created test user + session + project via mongosh for authenticated endpoint testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: v7 P1 features fully tested: (1) GET /api/models returns 7 models with id, label, provider, family, recommended fields. (2) GET /api/settings returns user settings with defaults (model_id=claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929, system_prompt='', byo_keys={}, integrations all {connected: false}). (3) PUT /api/settings validates model_id against SUPPORTED_MODELS (400 for unknown), system_prompt max 8000 chars (400 if exceeded), byo_keys stored and redacted to boolean on GET, empty string clears key. (4) POST /api/integrations/{github,vercel,netlify}/connect validates tokens against real APIs (401 for fake tokens). (5) DELETE /api/integrations/{provider} returns {disconnected: true, provider: X}, 400 for unknown provider. (6) POST /api/projects/{id}/{github/push,vercel/deploy,netlify/deploy} returns 400 with 'not connected' message when integration not set up. (7) Chat endpoints (/chat and /chat/stream) correctly resolve model + system prompt from user_settings with fallback to defaults. (8) All v6 features (activity log, project files, Yjs WS, export, invite) continue to work.

backend: GET /api/models - each model has provider field (anthropic/openai/gemini)
GET /api/settings - returns defaults for new user
PUT /api/settings - byo_keys stores key, GET returns redacted (boolean)
PUT /api/settings - byo_keys empty string clears key

mocked_apis.none: No mocking - backend calls real github.com/api.vercel.com/api.netlify.com for token validation. Fake tokens correctly rejected with 401.

from_previous_iterations.emergentintegrations_library_bug: get_checkout_status() fails with Pydantic validation error - checkout creation works, status polling returns 502
